text: 1A1B: kinase ATP-binding pocket, Lys-145 conserved across the family.
Conformational state of 1A28 shows the open form. Kd value not reported in this paper.
We discuss the 1B6H crystal contacts and pocket volume.
Near the Kd region of the binding pocket, the ligand makes an H-bond with Tyr-300.
The 1F0R structure was used as a template for homology modeling.
1KE5 belongs to the Family A GPCRs and shares 35% sequence identity with 1A1B.
Pocket residence fraction in 1NHU was high based on the trajectory plot.
RMSD of the 1QPE ligand stayed under 2.5 A throughout the MD.
1G2K shows multiple binding clusters; the largest covers 60% of frames.
Two-point H-bond network in 1A30 with Asp-200 and Ser-201.
